title: Crafts And Gunpowder
description: This mod adds weapons like a rocket launcher and other fun stuff like a tnt
body:
This mod adds the Rocket launcher, Machine gun and Nuclear Rocket launcher (and ammmo for them). This also adds crafting recipes for ammo and the recources to craft the ammo, a new advancment and new tnt (and recipe for the tnt).
This mod also includes 2 keybinds to use special powers which are nuke explosion and invisibility, but to balance them they take health on use, if you have too little health then you will die.
I have made a ammo box to store ammo however it cannot be used when it is in the ammo box.

This mod was made using Mcreator!
